title: Anthropic Docs
description: Use current Anthropic and Claude Code docs before answering Anthropic API, Claude Code, hooks, skills, plugins, settings, or MCP questions.
body: Use official Anthropic and Claude Code documentation as source truth. Prefer an installed Anthropic/Claude docs MCP when available. Context7 or official Anthropic/Claude docs URLs provide fallback source truth. Cite exact docs used. Provider hook, plugin, settings, and skill behavior comes from docs evidence.
